prompt: Assess lifecycle state, percent complete, defects, and remaining work.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is E-203 Cable tray within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.2 Raceway. The observed field condition is: cable not secured on vertical runs. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC Art. 392. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: T1 E-203 Progress assessment
